zh.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn於1278年出生在英國威爾斯。他和Gwenllian ferch Gwilym至少有1個兒子。他去世於1300年享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn于1278年出生在英国威尔斯。他和Gwenllian ferch Gwilym至少有1个儿子。他去世于1300年享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Gymen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Guymer
meanings: English: relationship name from the Old French personal name Guimar (Continental Germanic Wigmar). Compare Wymer .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn was born in 1278, in Wales, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. He died in 1300, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn est né en 1278, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. Il est décédé en 1300, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn wurde 1278 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Gwenllian ferch Gwilym mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1300 im Alter von 22 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn è nato il nel 1278 nel Galles, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. Morì nel 1300, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelynは1278年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた。彼はGwenllian ferch Gwilymとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1300年に22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn(은)는 1278년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그는 Gwenllian ferch Gwilym(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn nasceu em 1278, em Gales, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. Ele faleceu em 1300, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn родился в 1278 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. Он умер в 1300 г. в возрасте 22 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hywel Gymen ap Llywelyn nació en 1278, en Gales, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gwenllian ferch Gwilym. Murió en 1300, a la edad de 22 años.
